issues.offending_span: with Q3 showing 21.96% YoY growth and Q4 revenue reaching $68.13 billion [db68e3f3-b4e9-49cf-86fe-9602627ec55b]
issues.explanation: The citation [db68e3f3-b4e9-49cf-86fe-9602627ec55b] is placed to support both the Q3 YoY growth claim (21.96%) and the Q4 revenue claim ($68.13 billion). However, chunk db68e3f3 only contains Q4 income statement data and does not include any Q3 growth information. The Q3 21.96% YoY growth figure actually comes from calc ID 0e671c19, not from the cited chunk.
issues.recommended_fix: Add calc ID 0e671c19-4b44-47a7-9234-5d3634f7be27 as a citation immediately after the Q3 21.96% YoY growth claim, or restructure the sentence to clearly separate the citations: 'with Q3 showing 21.96% YoY growth [0e671c19-4b44-47a7-9234-5d3634f7be27] and Q4 revenue reaching $68.13 billion [db68e3f3-b4e9-49cf-86fe-9602627ec55b]'
